Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
74 
CLM_HHA_TOT_VISIT_CNT 
LABEL: 
Claim HHA Total Visit Count 
DESCRIPTION: The count of the number of HHA visits as derived by CMS. 
SHORT NAME: VISITCNT 
LONG NAME: CLM_HHA_TOT_VISIT_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
Derivation rule (units associated with revenue center codes 042X, 043X, 044X, 055X, 056X, 057X, 058X, 
and 059X). Value 999
